title: lycopodium scariosum var. holtonii
intro: Lycopodium scariosum var. holtonii, also known as Staghorn Club Moss, is a species of club moss that belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Lycopodium scariosum var. holtonii include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Lycopodium scariosum var. holtonii can be prepared into herbal remedies through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions.
